<!--
This is a focused preview tool, not a feature kitchen sink. Please check the
v1 out-of-scope list at the bottom before filing.
-->

## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- Describe the user-facing pain. "I'm prototyping X and Y is hard because Z." -->

## What you'd like Genui to do

<!-- Concrete proposal. UI sketch, setting name, command name, whatever's most precise. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could solve this? Existing workarounds? Why aren't they enough? -->

## Out of scope check

Genui v1 is deliberately narrow. Before filing, please confirm the request is NOT one of:

- [ ] Editing UI from within the preview (one-way render only by design)
- [ ] Bundled AI / agent (agents write files; the extension reads them — two concerns stay separate)
- [ ] Telemetry, analytics, or network calls (CSP forbids network from the webview)
- [ ] Syntax highlighting / IntelliSense / LSP for `.openui` (v1.x — not in scope yet)

If your request is one of these, the answer will likely be "not in v1; consider it for v2+".

## Anything else

<!-- Links to similar features in other extensions, references, prior art. -->
